schema.description:
Serializer for TrackedContract model.
Used for creating, updating, and returning tracked Soroban smart contracts.

alias.description: Optional friendly name/alias for easier identification (e.g. 'Token Transfer Contract')

json_schema.description: Optional JSON Schema used to validate ingested event payloads.

deprecation_status.description:
Manual lifecycle/deprecation state for warning users

* `active` - Active
* `deprecated` - Deprecated
* `suspended` - Suspended

deprecation_reason.description: Optional reason shown to users when contract is deprecated/suspended

max_events_per_minute.description: Max events per minute for ingest-time rate limiting (None = unlimited)

event_filter_type.description:
Ingest filter mode: none = store all events; whitelist = only store listed event types; blacklist = drop listed event types.

* `none` - No Filter
* `whitelist` - Whitelist
* `blacklist` - Blacklist

event_filter_list.description: List of event type names used by the whitelist/blacklist filter.

metadata.description: Custom attributes for storing contract metadata (team, owner, cost center, etc.)

last_indexed_ledger.description: Last ledger sequence that was indexed for this contract

last_event_at.description: Timestamp of the last indexed event for this contract

schema.title: TrackedContract
